property.name: java.library.path
property.value:
C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-25.0.2 in;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java in;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;%JAVA_HOME% in;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files (x86)\NVIDIA Corporation\PhysX\Common;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA Corporation\NVIDIA NvDLISR;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files
odejs\;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;D:\APP\maven\apache-maven-3.9.14 in;C:\Users\abees\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\abees\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code in;C:\Users\abees\AppData\Roaming
pm;C:\Users\abees\.dotnet	ools;C:\Users\abees\AppData\Local\GitHubDesktop in;C:\Users\abees\AppData\Local\Programs\Antigravity in;C:\Users\abees\AppData\Local\PowerToys\DSCModules\;C:\Users\abees\AppData\Local\jdk-11.0.2 in;C:\Users\abees\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\abees\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code in;C:\Users\abees\AppData\Roaming

testcase.name: launchWebPage
testcase.system-out: 15:23:07 [main] INFO com.Log.LoggerControl - PASS: --- Test Started: Automating Chrome New Tab Page --- Exception while taking screenshot: Cannot invoke "org.openqa.selenium.TakesScreenshot.getScreenshotAs(org.openqa.selenium.OutputType)" because "ts" is null 15:23:07 [main] INFO com.Log.LoggerControl - PASS: Attempting to launch Chrome and navigate to chrome://newtab/ Exception while taking screenshot: Cannot invoke "org.openqa.selenium.TakesScreenshot.getScreenshotAs(org.openqa.selenium.OutputType)" because "ts" is null 15:23:09 [main] INFO com.Log.LoggerControl - PASS: Launched chrome browser successfully. Navigating to: chrome://newtab/ Exception while taking screenshot: Cannot invoke "org.openqa.selenium.TakesScreenshot.getScreenshotAs(org.openqa.selenium.OutputType)" because "ts" is null 15:23:10 [main] INFO com.Log.LoggerControl - PASS: Navigated to chrome://newtab/ successfully.
